entity.label: Jehdeiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the Levitical attendants at the temple, a descendant of Shubael (1 Chr. 24:20).

nodes.label: Jehdeiah
nodes.description: One of the Levitical attendants at the temple, a descendant of Shubael (1 Chr. 24:20).

nodes.label: Shubael
nodes.description: One of the descendants of Gershom, who had charge of the temple treasures in the time of David (1 Chr. 23:16; 26:24).

verses.text: And the rest of the sons of Levi were these: Of the sons of Amram; Shubael: of the sons of Shubael; Jehdeiah.
